title: Ad-hoc Order
description: A request that is generated by a Consumer for information the OAIS has indicated is currently available.

definitions.definition: A request that is generated by a Consumer for information the OAIS has indicated is currently available.
definitions.notes: A general request for data from tape or disk cache without sub-setting or packaging; may become a subscription (standing order) repeating; or bulk order if exceed threshold - requires an order processor
